steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: The relative clause that...aim to bring adjutants back contains an interrupting prepositional phrase through community involvement and scientific ______ that begins with an em dash immediately after that.

steps.title: Apply the paired em dash rule
steps.content:
Paired em dashes set off parenthetical information—the opening dash after that requires a closing dash after the blank to mark where the interruption ends and the verb aim resumes.

Choices B, C, and D fail to close the opening dash with a comma, colon, or no punctuation.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
